title: Nerd Emoji: Copy & Paste 🤓 Nerd Face Meme Combos
meta_description: The 🤓 nerd emoji plus erm-actually ☝ meme combos, study and science emojis, and glasses kaomoji like (⌐■_■) for replies. Click any emoji to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: The 🤓 nerd face, the ☝🤓 "erm, actually" meme kit, study props, and glasses kaomoji. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: The nerd emoji 🤓 went from "bookworm" to one of the internet's favorite meme reactions — paired with ☝ it instantly reads as "erm, actually..." pedantry. This page collects the nerd emoji and its bespectacled relatives, the full erm-actually meme kit, study and science props for genuine academic posts, and glasses kaomoji like (⌐■_■) — plus one-click nerd combo sets for replies and captions.
